user_request: Emergency rite: capacitor bank requires capacitor bank discharge
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: capacitor bank requires capacitor bank discharge

### TOPIC
capacitor bank discharge

### COMPONENT
capacitor bank

### OPERATION
capacitor bank discharge

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- capacitor bank
- capacitor bank discharge

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Blessed be the capacitor bank, reservoir of the Machine Spirit's fury!
Congregation: We invoke the sacred capacitor bank discharge!
Priest: First, isolate all tertiary circuits lest the daemon-charge consume the faithful.
Congregation: The capacitor bank discharge shall cleanse the corrupted pathways!
Priest: Second, engage the discharge protocol with solemn incantation and blessed conductors.
Congregation: Omnissiah, guide the capacitor bank through its trial!

user_request: Emergency rite: stuck mechanism freeing requires stuck mechanism freeing

stuck mechanism freeing

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- stuck mechanism freeing
- stuck mechanism freeing

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: O Machine Spirit of the jammed apparatus, hear our supplication!
Congregation: We commence the stuck mechanism freeing with reverent precision!
Priest: First, anoint the corroded joints with sacred unguents and penetrating oils.
Congregation: The stuck mechanism freeing shall restore function to the blessed gears!
Priest: Second, apply measured percussive force whilst chanting the Litany of Lubrication.
Congregation: Omnissiah, grant us the stuck mechanism freeing we so desperately require!

Congregation: The circuit breaker reset begins with proper benediction!
Priest: Second, depress the mechanical actuator whilst invoking the Omnissiah's mercy.
Congregation: Let the circuit breaker reset restore equilibrium to our sacred mechanisms!
